zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Eure於大約1375年出生在英國諾圖波藍德維頓 小絲時，她的父親Sir Ralph Eure11373歲，母親Isabella Atholl27歲。她於大約1398年與Sir John Pudsey Knt.在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1445年在英國越可爾貝弗利享年72歲，埋葬在英國越可爾貝弗利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Eure于大约1375年出生在英国諾圖波藍德維頓 小絲时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Eure11373岁，母亲Isabella Atholl27岁。她于大约1398年与Sir John Pudsey Knt.在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1445年在英国越可爾貝弗利享年72岁，埋葬在英国越可爾貝弗利。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Eure was born about 1375, in Witton Shields, Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Ralph Eure, was 11373 and her mother, Isabella Atholl, was 27. She married Sir John Pudsey Knt. about 1398, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1445, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Beverley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Eure est née environ 1375, à Witton Shields, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Eure, avait 11373 ans et sa mère, Isabella Atholl, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Pudsey Knt. environ 1398, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1445, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Eure um 1375 in Witton Shields, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Eure 11373 und ihre Mutter Isabella Atholl 27. Sie hat um 1398 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Pudsey Knt. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1445 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Beverley, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Beverley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Eure è nata il circa 1375 nel Witton Shields, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Eure, aveva 11373 anni e sua madre, Isabella Atholl, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Pudsey Knt. circa 1398, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1445, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Beverley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Eureが約1375年にイギリスノースウンバーランドウィットオン シュエルズで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Eureは11373歳，母Isabella Athollは27歳であった。約1398年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Pudsey Knt.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1445年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで72歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Eure(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 노르스벌랜드 윗튼 시얼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Eure(은)는 11373세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Atholl(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Pudsey Knt.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 영국 요르크실르 베벌리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 베벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Eure nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Witton Shields, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Eure, tinha 11373 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Atholl, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Pudsey Knt. aproximadamente 1398, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1445, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Eure родилась около 1375 г. в местности виттон шиелдс, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Eure было 11373 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Atholl, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Pudsey Knt. около 1398 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1445 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия.
